text:
The user wants to:
1. Make all tabs work (Cost, Appliance, Usage by Rooms)
2. Remove "Emission" tab since AQI has been removed from the project

I need to:
1. Look at the frontend HTML/JS to understand the current tab structure
2. Find where emission-related code exists
3. Remove emission references
4. Ensure all tabs work properly

Let me first look at the frontend files to understand the structure.
